label: Escalating Security Risks in Middle East

timeline.event: US State Department Orders Personnel to Leave Beirut
timeline.description: The US ordered non-emergency personnel out of its Beirut embassy due to escalating security risks and Iran tensions.

timeline.event: Iran Reportedly Nearing Anti-Ship Missile Deal with China
timeline.description: Reports indicate Iran is close to finalizing a major purchase of anti-ship cruise missiles from China amid regional military tensions.
